# StreamStack NZ

> StreamStack is New Zealand's first streaming bill aggregator. One monthly payment for all your streaming platforms at a better rate.

## What StreamStack Does

StreamStack bundles Netflix, Neon, Disney+, Prime Video and Apple TV+ into a single monthly bill for New Zealand households. Instead of paying multiple separate subscriptions, customers pay one amount to StreamStack and we handle the billing with each platform.

StreamStack is a billing layer only — customers still log into each streaming platform as normal. Nothing changes about how they watch.

## How It Works

1. Customer selects which platforms they want
2. StreamStack pays each platform on the customer's behalf
3. Customer pays StreamStack one consolidated monthly bill
4. Customer logs into each platform as normal

## Current Status

Pre-launch. Taking waitlist signups at streamstack.co.nz.

## Company

- Founded: 2026
- Location: New Zealand
- Founder: Vanessa Crafts
- Website: https://streamstack.co.nz
- Instagram: @streamstack_ltd
- TikTok: @streamstack_ltd

## FAQs

Q: Is StreamStack available in New Zealand?
A: Yes. Built specifically for the NZ market.

Q: Do I still log into Netflix separately?
A: Yes. StreamStack handles billing only.

Q: What platforms does StreamStack support?
A: Netflix, Neon, Disney+, Prime Video and Apple TV+.

Q: How much does StreamStack cost?
A: Target pricing is approximately 20% off retail. Final pricing confirmed before launch.

Q: Is StreamStack live yet?
A: Not yet. Join the waitlist at streamstack.co.nz.
